steps.name: origin-ui-source-inventory
steps.summary: Checked active coss ui docs/roadmap and legacy Origin category index. coss ui exposes 50+ primitives and 492 particles; most primitives duplicate existing terms, so Step 1 should inspect legacy Origin/coss particles for behaviorally distinct form/input compositions. Wrote phases/external-ui-ecosystem-vocabulary/origin-ui-inventory.md with source sections, duplicate prefilter, and a 20-item Step 1 candidate queue.

steps.name: origin-ui-form-input-batch
steps.summary: Promoted 8 Origin/coss form-input terms: floating-label-field, clearable-input, inline-submit-field, character-count-field, password-strength-meter, fieldset, checkbox-card, and date-preset-picker. Added coss-ui-docs source id, related/anti-use duplicate boundaries, and dedicated OriginCossVisual renderers. Validation passed with 430 terms.

steps.name: origin-ui-navigation-disclosure-batch
steps.summary: Promoted 6 Origin/coss navigation-disclosure terms: navbar-menu, nav-user-menu, breadcrumb-overflow, popover-form, disclosure-card, and pagination-jump. Each term compares against existing navigation/popover/pagination concepts to avoid duplicate meaning and has a dedicated mini visual.

steps.name: origin-ui-data-feedback-layout-batch
steps.summary: Promoted 8 Origin/coss data-feedback terms: avatar-stack, status-avatar, badge-group, meter, table-row-actions, empty-filter-state, notification-inbox-row, and progress-stepper. Full local verification passed: validate-ui-vocabulary, build:data, strict duplicate audit, build, and lint. Production deploy remains intentionally pending.

steps.name: shadcn-blocks-ecosystem-coverage
steps.summary: Designed and executed the first M2 pass for adjacent shadcn block ecosystems. Promoted 10 block/form-pattern terms: pricing-section, testimonial-section, feature-grid-section, integration-grid-section, settings-page-layout, profile-settings-form, billing-settings-page, onboarding-flow-page, newsletter-section, and cta-section. Source id blocks-so-library added; official shadcn block duplicates remain excluded.

steps.name: motion-effect-ui-coverage
steps.summary: Designed and executed the first M3 pass for Magic UI-style motion/effect vocabulary. Promoted 10 terms: animated-gradient-background, marquee-row, border-beam, orbiting-icons, spotlight-card, grid-pattern-background, typing-text-effect, number-ticker, blur-fade-in, animated-shiny-text, and dot-pattern-background. Source id magic-ui-docs added and motion-only decorative terms were constrained with anti-use notes.

steps.name: aceternity-ui-coverage
steps.summary: Designed and executed the first M4 pass for Aceternity-style landing/hero/card vocabulary. Promoted 10 terms: bento-grid, sticky-scroll-section, floating-navbar, three-d-card, hover-card-stack, background-beams, aurora-background, spotlight-hero, infinite-moving-cards, canvas-reveal-card, and tracing-beam-section. Source id aceternity-ui-docs added; terms overlapping M3 are linked via related or kept to landing-section semantics.
